name: seosanch-cell
description: Cloudflare Pages cell member care manager.

scripts.deploy: npm run prepare:deploy && npx wrangler pages deploy .deploy-public --project-name seosanch-cell
scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/auth.js && node --check lib/webauthn.js && node --check functions/_middleware.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js
